name: Rodgers Beach
description: Quieter neighbor to Baby Beach near the fishing village of Savaneta — more local, less touristy feel.

rockiness.beach: White sand with some rocky sections 🏖️
rockiness.ocean_floor: Mostly sand; moderate depth increase offshore

characteristics.depth_profile: Sandy slope with moderate depth increase; less enclosed than Baby Beach.
characteristics.access: Free parking near Baby Beach area; short drive from San Nicolas
characteristics.facilities: Very limited — bring water and snacks
fun_facts: Quieter neighbor to Baby Beach near the fishing village of Savaneta — more local, less touristy feel.
